Hi my user name in this game that is awesome is Barbieboy and im 15 and as you can tell in the title I’m asking can I be mod but for a reason so I can help the community and get rid of toxic people so if anybody tries to pretend to be you, I will ban them, because impersonating is illegal, and I hate illegal stuff so if anybody impersonates or bees toxic, they will be banned and I promise to always follow the rules and not take out the stick just to show off. I will only take out the stick, whenever somebody is impersonating not following the rules or the cheating toxicity or hate speech
And I just want to say this game is awesome and I had no problems with spending money on this game and again thank you for making this game because if this game was not here, I would probably quit playing quest, so just thank you thank you to the owner and if I find that kid that was player tracking me I will ban them to teach them a lesson, but not in a mean way, and just like I said, I will always follow the rules if I ever become a moderator in this game and again thank you because this game is a great game and I will always always play it
